name: Rattata

abilities.name: Run Away
abilities.description: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.description: Boosts Attack if there is a status problem.

hidden_abilities.name: Hustle
hidden_abilities.description: Boosts the Attack stat, but lowers accuracy.

pokedex: A Rattata is cautious in the extreme. Even while it is asleep, it constantly moves its ears and listens for danger. It will make its nest anywhere.

level_up.name: Tail Whip
level_up.description: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary and lowering their Defense stat.

level_up.name: Tackle
level_up.description: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.

level_up.name: Quick Attack
level_up.description: The user lunges at the target at a speed that makes it almost invisible. It is sure to strike first.

level_up.name: Focus Energy
level_up.description: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

level_up.name: Bite
level_up.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. It may make the target flinch.

level_up.name: Laser Focus
level_up.description: The user focuses intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit.

level_up.name: Take Down
level_up.description: A reckless, full-body charge attack for slamming into the foe. It also damages the user a little.

level_up.name: Assurance
level_up.description: If the target has already taken some damage in the same turn, this attack's power is doubled.

level_up.name: Crunch
level_up.description: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

level_up.name: Sucker Punch
level_up.description: This move enables the user to attack first. It fails if the target is not readying an attack, however.

level_up.name: Super Fang
level_up.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. It cuts the target's HP to half.

level_up.name: Double-Edge
level_up.description: A reckless, life-risking tackle. It also damages the user by a fairly large amount, however.

level_up.name: Endeavor
level_up.description: An attack move that cuts down the target's HP to equal the user's HP.

tutor.name: Attract
tutor.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target becomes infatuated and less likely to attack.

tutor.name: Blizzard
tutor.description: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike the opposing team. It may also freeze them solid.

tutor.name: Body Slam
tutor.description: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. It may leave the target with paralysis.

tutor.name: Captivate
tutor.description: If it is the opposite gender of the user, the target is charmed into harshly lowering its Sp. Atk stat.

tutor.name: Charge Beam
tutor.description: The user fires a concentrated bundle of electricity. It may also raise the user's Sp. Atk stat.

tutor.name: Confide
tutor.description: The user tells the target a secret. The target loses focus and its Sp. Atk stat is lowered.

tutor.name: Counter
tutor.description: A retaliation move that counters any physical attack, inflicting double the damage taken.

tutor.name: Covet
tutor.description: The user endearingly approaches the target, then steals the target's held item.

tutor.name: Cut
tutor.description: The target is cut with a scythe or a claw. It can also be used to cut down thin trees.

tutor.name: Defense Curl
tutor.description: The user curls up to conceal weak spots and raise its Defense stat.

tutor.name: Dig
tutor.description: The user burrows, then attacks on the second turn. It can also be used to exit dungeons.

tutor.name: Double-Edge
tutor.description: A reckless, life-risking tackle. It also damages the user by a fairly large amount, however.

tutor.name: Double Team
tutor.description: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to raise its evasiveness.

tutor.name: Endeavor
tutor.description: An attack move that cuts down the target's HP to equal the user's HP.

tutor.name: Endure
tutor.description: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

tutor.name: Facade
tutor.description: An attack move that doubles its power if the user is poisoned, burned, or has paralysis.

tutor.name: Frustration
tutor.description: A full-power attack that grows more powerful the less the user likes its Trainer.

tutor.name: Grass Knot
tutor.description: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the damage.

tutor.name: Headbutt
tutor.description: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging into the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

tutor.name: Hidden Power
tutor.description: A unique attack that varies in type and intensity depending on the Pokémon using it.

tutor.name: Ice Beam
tutor.description: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. It may also freeze the target solid.

tutor.name: Icy Wind
tutor.description: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. It also lowers the targets' Speed stat.

tutor.name: Iron Tail
tutor.description: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. It may also lower the target's Defense stat.

tutor.name: Last Resort
tutor.description: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

tutor.name: Mimic
tutor.description: The user copies the move last used by the foe. The move can be used until the user is switched out.

tutor.name: Mud-Slap
tutor.description: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.

tutor.name: Natural Gift
tutor.description: The user draws power to attack by using its held Berry. The Berry determines its type and power.

tutor.name: Pluck
tutor.description: The user pecks the target. If the target is holding a Berry, the user eats it and gains its effect.

tutor.name: Protect
tutor.description: It enables the user to evade all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

tutor.name: Rain Dance
tutor.description: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type moves.

tutor.name: Rest
tutor.description: The user goes to sleep for two turns. It fully restores the user's HP and heals any status problem.

tutor.name: Retaliate
tutor.description: Gets revenge for a fainted ally. If an ally fainted in the last turn, this attack's damage increases.

tutor.name: Return
tutor.description: A full-power attack that grows more powerful the more the user likes its Trainer.

tutor.name: Rock Smash
tutor.description: The user attacks with a punch that can shatter a rock. It may also lower the foe's Defense stat.

tutor.name: Round
tutor.description: The user attacks with a song. Others can join in the Round and make the attack do greater damage.

tutor.name: Secret Power
tutor.description: The user attacks with a secret power. Its added effects vary depending on the user's environment.

tutor.name: Shadow Ball
tutor.description: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. It may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tutor.name: Shock Wave
tutor.description: The user strikes the target with a quick jolt of electricity. This attack cannot be evaded.

tutor.name: Sleep Talk
tutor.description: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

tutor.name: Sludge Bomb
tutor.description: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. It may also poison the target.

tutor.name: Snore
tutor.description: An attack that can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.

tutor.name: Substitute
tutor.description: The user makes a copy of itself using some of its HP. The copy serves as the user's decoy.

tutor.name: Sucker Punch
tutor.description: This move enables the user to attack first. It fails if the target is not readying an attack, however.

tutor.name: Sunny Day
tutor.description: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type moves.

tutor.name: Super Fang
tutor.description: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. It cuts the target's HP to half.

tutor.name: Swagger
tutor.description: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, it also sharply raises the target's Attack stat.

tutor.name: Swift
tutor.description: Star-shaped rays are shot at the opposing team. This attack never misses.

tutor.name: Taunt
tutor.description: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

tutor.name: Thief
tutor.description: The user attacks and steals the foe's held item simultaneously. It can't steal if the user holds an item.

tutor.name: Thunder
tutor.description: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the foe to inflict damage. It may also leave the target paralyzed.

tutor.name: Thunderbolt
tutor.description: A strong electric blast is loosed at the target. It may also leave the target with paralysis.

tutor.name: Thunder Wave
tutor.description: A weak electric charge is launched at the target. It causes paralysis if it hits.

tutor.name: Uproar
tutor.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. Over that time, no one can fall asleep.

tutor.name: U-turn
tutor.description: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

tutor.name: Wild Charge
tutor.description: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its foe. It also damages the user a little.

tutor.name: Work Up
tutor.description: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

tutor.name: Zen Headbutt
tutor.description: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the foe. It may also make the target flinch.

egg.name: Bite
egg.description: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. It may make the target flinch.

egg.name: Counter
egg.description: A retaliation move that counters any physical attack, inflicting double the damage taken.

egg.name: Final Gambit
egg.description: The user risks all to attack the foe. The user faints but does damage equal to its HP.

egg.name: Flame Wheel
egg.description: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges at the target. It may also leave the target with a burn.

egg.name: Fury Swipes
egg.description: The target is raked with sharp claws or scythes for two to five times in quick succession.

egg.name: Last Resort
egg.description: This move can be used only after the user has used all the other moves it knows in the battle.

egg.name: Revenge
egg.description: An attack move that inflicts double the damage if the user has been hurt by the foe in the same turn.

egg.name: Reversal
egg.description: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

egg.name: Screech
egg.description: An earsplitting screech harshly reduces the target's Defense stat.

egg.name: Uproar
egg.description: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. Over that time, no one can fall asleep.

name: Raticate

abilities.name: Run Away
abilities.description: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: Guts
abilities.description: Boosts Attack if there is a status problem.

hidden_abilities.name: Hustle
hidden_abilities.description: Boosts the Attack stat, but lowers accuracy.

pokedex: A Raticate's sturdy fangs grow steadily. To keep them ground down, it gnaws on rocks and logs. It may even chew on the walls of houses.
